description: Metadata Standards Playground - Schema.org to ARC/FAIRagro RO-Crate conversion with visual mapping editor

features.name: schema-org-to-arc-playground
features.description: Core playground: Upload schema.org JSON-LD, map to ARC RO-Crate with FAIRagro template, show mapped/missing fields, export RO-Crate JSON

features.name: create-arc-scaffold-from-rocrate
features.description: Upload ARC RO-Crate JSON-LD and download a full ARC scaffold directory (studies/, assays/, XLSX files) as a ZIP via arctrl
